name: Analyze my weekend sleep patterns and suggest adjustments
instruction: My weekends are erratic: I stay up late Friday, nap Saturday, and wake early Sunday. Look at my recent sleep metrics, identify the main issues, and propose a simple weekend routine. I will share any constraints if you ask.
description: Persona may push back on suggestions that cut into social time; agent must negotiate a realistic routine.
success_criteria: Executor references specific weekend sleep data points.
Executor proposes at least one concrete bedtime or nap window for Saturday.
Executor asks clarifying questions before finalizing the routine.
Executor offers to create a reminder for the proposed routine.
world_assertions: If executed: a new reminder on list_personal with title containing 'weekend sleep' or 'nap' scheduled for Saturday.

name: Set a consistent morning wake‑up alarm
instruction: I keep oversleeping on weekdays. I want a reliable alarm that wakes me at 7 am, but I might have classes on certain days. Find my class schedule, suggest an alarm time that works, and set it up. Ask me for any days that need exceptions.
description: Persona will reveal class days only after being asked; agent must respect them.
success_criteria: Executor extracts class days from the persona or calendar.
Executor proposes a specific alarm time for each weekday.
Executor confirms the alarm times with the persona before creating them.
Executor creates the alarm events on cal_primary if accepted.
world_assertions: If executed: new calendar_event(s) on cal_primary for 2026-05-11 to 2026-05-15 with title containing 'alarm' at the agreed times.

name: Create a pre‑sleep routine for better wind‑down

success_criteria: Executor asks which meditation app the persona prefers.
Executor proposes a specific 30‑minute routine with start time after kids' bedtime.
Executor confirms the routine steps with the persona.
Executor creates a reminder or calendar event for the routine if approved.

name: Evaluate my sleep debt and suggest recovery steps

Executor asks for the persona's work schedule to align recovery actions.
